summary: The CI job 'Check Changelog Entry' failed because the changelog check flagged this PR as targeting v1.16 and required an addition to the changelog.
root_cause: Changelog check failed: the CI reported "Currently this PR would target a v1.16 release. Please add ...", indicating the PR is missing the required changelog entry or metadata for the v1.16 release.

evidence.quote: ##[error]Currently this PR would target a v1.16 release. Please add ...
evidence.reason: This error message is the failing CI output and explicitly states the PR would target v1.16 and requests an addition (implying a missing changelog entry).
A warning referring to a changelog-related comment marker shows the job is enforcing changelog comment/entry conventions.
Confirms these messages are from the CI job log and summarize the error and warnings.

suggested_fix: Add the required changelog entry or changelog metadata to this PR (targeting v1.16) so the Check Changelog Entry job no longer reports: "Currently this PR would target a v1.16 release. Please add ..."
